title: scorzoneroides autumnalis var. alpina
intro: Scorzoneroides autumnalis var. alpina, also known as Alpine Autumn Knawel or Alpine Scorzonera, is a perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Scorzoneroides autumnalis var. alpina include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support kidney function. In herbal preparations, it is often used as a tea or tincture, and its roots can be dried and powdered for use in capsules or other forms of supplementation.
